en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO THE DOE OF THE DAWN. A PSALM OF DAVID. My God, my God, why have you forsaken me? Why are you so far from saving me, from the words of my groaning?
zh: 我的 神！我的 神！你為甚麼離棄我？ 為甚麼遠離不救我，不聽我呻吟的話呢？

en: O my God, I cry by day, but you do not answer, and by night, but I find no rest.
zh: 我的 神啊！我日間呼求，你不應允； 在晚上我還是不停止。

en: Yet you are holy, enthroned on the praises of Israel.
zh: 但你是聖潔的， 是用以色列的讚美為寶座的。

en: In you our fathers trusted; they trusted, and you delivered them.
zh: 我們的列祖倚靠你， 他們倚靠你，你就救他們。

en: To you they cried and were rescued; in you they trusted and were not put to shame.
zh: 他們向你哀求，就得拯救； 他們倚靠你，就不失望。

en: But I am a worm and not a man, scorned by mankind and despised by the people.
zh: 但我是蟲，不是人， 是世上所羞辱的，也是眾人所藐視的。

en: All who see me mock me; they make mouths at me; they wag their heads;
zh: 看見我的，都嘲笑我； 他們撇著嘴，搖著頭，說：

en: "He trusts in the LORD; let him deliver him; let him rescue him, for he delights in him!"
zh: “他既然把自己交託耶和華， 就讓耶和華搭救他吧！ 耶和華既然喜悅他，就讓耶和華拯救他吧！”

en: Yet you are he who took me from the womb; you made me trust you at my mother's breasts.
zh: 然而，是你使我從母腹中出來的； 我在母親的懷裡，你就使我有倚靠的心。

en: On you was I cast from my birth, and from my mother's womb you have been my God.
zh: 我自出母胎，就被交託給你； 我一出母腹，你就是我的 神。

en: Be not far from me, for trouble is near, and there is none to help.
zh: 求你不要遠離我，因為災難臨近了， 卻沒有人幫助我。

en: Many bulls encompass me; strong bulls of Bashan surround me;
zh: 有許多公牛圍著我， 巴珊強壯的公牛困住了我。

en: they open wide their mouths at me, like a ravening and roaring lion.
zh: 他們向我大大地張嘴， 像抓撕吼叫的獅子。

en: I am poured out like water, and all my bones are out of joint; my heart is like wax; it is melted within my breast;
zh: 我好像水被傾倒出去， 我全身的骨頭都散脫了， 我的心在我裡面像蠟融化。

en: my strength is dried up like a potsherd, and my tongue sticks to my jaws; you lay me in the dust of death.
zh: 我的精力像瓦片一樣枯乾， 我的舌頭緊黏著上顎， 你把我放在死亡的塵土中。

en: For dogs encompass me; a company of evildoers encircles me; they have pierced my hands and feet-
zh: 犬類圍著我， 惡黨環繞我， 他們扎了 我的手我的腳。

en: I can count all my bones- they stare and gloat over me;
zh: 我能數算我全身的骨頭， 他們卻瞪著眼看我。

en: they divide my garments among them, and for my clothing they cast lots.
zh: 他們彼此分了我的外衣， 又為我的內衣抽籤。

en: But you, O LORD, do not be far off! O you my help, come quickly to my aid!
zh: 至於你，耶和華啊！求你不要遠離我； 我的力量啊！求你快來幫助我。

en: Deliver my soul from the sword, my precious life from the power of the dog!
zh: 求你搭救我的性命脫離刀劍， 搭救我的生命脫離惡狗的爪。

en: Save me from the mouth of the lion! You have rescued me from the horns of the wild oxen!
zh: 求你拯救我脫離獅子的口， 拯救我脫離野牛的角。 你已經應允了我。

en: I will tell of your name to my brothers; in the midst of the congregation I will praise you:
zh: 我要向我的兄弟宣揚你的名， 我要在聚會中讚美你。

en: You who fear the LORD, praise him! All you offspring of Jacob, glorify him, and stand in awe of him, all you offspring of Israel!
zh: 敬畏耶和華的人哪！你們要讚美他； 雅各所有的後裔啊！你們都要尊敬他； 以色列所有的後裔啊！你們都要懼怕他。

en: For he has not despised or abhorred the affliction of the afflicted, and he has not hidden his face from him, but has heard, when he cried to him.
zh: 因為他不輕看，不厭惡受苦的人的痛苦，也沒有掩面不顧他； 受苦的人呼求的時候，他就垂聽。

en: From you comes my praise in the great congregation; my vows I will perform before those who fear him.
zh: 在大會中，我讚美你的話是從你而來的； 在敬畏耶和華的人面前，我要還我的願。

en: The afflicted shall eat and be satisfied; those who seek him shall praise the LORD! May your hearts live forever!
zh: 受苦的人必吃得飽足， 尋求耶和華的人必讚美他， 願你們的心永遠活著！

en: All the ends of the earth shall remember and turn to the LORD, and all the families of the nations shall worship before you.
zh: 地的四極，都要記念耶和華，並且歸向他。 列國的萬族，都要在他 面前敬拜。

en: For kingship belongs to the LORD, and he rules over the nations.
zh: 因為國度是屬於耶和華的， 他是掌管萬國的。

en: All the prosperous of the earth eat and worship; before him shall bow all who go down to the dust, even the one who could not keep himself alive.
zh: 地上所有富足的人，都必吃喝、敬拜； 所有下到塵土中，不再存活的人， 都在他面前屈身下拜。

en: Posterity shall serve him; it shall be told of the Lord to the coming generation;
zh: 必有後裔服事他， 必有人把主的事向後代述說。

en: they shall come and proclaim his righteousness to a people yet unborn, that he has done it.
zh: 他們要把他的公義傳給以後出生的民， 說明這是他所作的。
